rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee statements in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features or declared auxiliary variables
Use only identifiers visible in the current component scope; do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks are scoped to their owning component and must reference only visible symbols
Component type contracts should express input assumptions and output guarantees using concrete bounds or visible relations
Implementation contracts may use assign for output bindings but must not include guarantee statements
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks with syntax: assume "label": expr; guarantee "label": expr; eq name : type = expr; const name : type = value; assign output = expr;
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables; they are not automatically in scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assume/guarantee in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE variables
Model fusion and component insertion locations
